data.body: The brainstorm feasibility review (Phase 2 Step 3) triggers only on external integration signal keywords (third-party APIs, CI/CD, infrastructure). It misses first-time usage of internal platform features (e.g., a Claude Code hook type the project has never used before). The principle — 'does this approach depend on something unverified?' — applies equally to unfamiliar internal capabilities. The trigger heuristic should also scan for platform features with no existing usage in the codebase (e.g., hook types not present in any settings.json, tool types not used in any agent definition).
